paper_title: Geological and Stratigraphic Analysis of Central Iran

methods.method_name: Field Sampling and Thin Section Preparation
methods.description: This method involves collecting rock samples from the Sekonj and Abaregh successions and preparing thin sections for further analysis. It is used to study the changes in genus, color, bedding, and grain size of the rock samples.

steps.description: In the field studies, based on the observed changes in genus, color, bedding and grain size, 250 samples were taken from the Sekonj and Abaregh successions.
steps.searchable_summary: collect 250 rock samples from Sekonj and Abaregh successions based on observed geological features

steps.description: Thin sections were prepared from the collected samples.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare thin sections from collected rock samples

methods.description: This method measures the abundance of skeletal and nonskeletal allochems in the rock samples and classifies the silisiclastic and carbonate rocks using established classification systems.

steps.description: Abundance of skeletal and nonskeletal allochems were measured based on the compared charts of [17].
steps.searchable_summary: measure abundance of allochems using comparison charts

steps.description: The silisiclastic rocks are named by the classification of [18] and the carbonates rocks are basis on the nomenclature of [19].
steps.searchable_summary: classify silisiclastic and carbonate rocks using established nomenclature

methods.description: This method reconstructs the sedimentary paleoenvironment and sedimentary model in the studied sections based on field observations and laboratory studies.

steps.description: The results of field observations and laboratory studies led to reconstruction of the sedimentary paleoenvironment and sedimentary model in the studied sections.
steps.searchable_summary: reconstruct sedimentary paleoenvironment using field and lab data

methods.description: This method analyzes the sequence stratigraphy in the studied sections based on established sequence stratigraphy principles.

steps.description: Analysis of the sequence stratigraphy in the studied sections is based on the sequence stratigraphy principles of [20] [21] and [22].
steps.searchable_summary: analyze sequence stratigraphy using established principles
